tool_input.command:
nexus content search-all --limit 100 "WooCommerce OR ecommerce OR shop OR cart OR checkout OR product" --json 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
results = data if isinstance(data, list) else data.get('results', [])
local_results = [r for r in results if not str(r.get('siteId','')).startswith('wpe-') and not str(r.get('site','')).startswith('wpe-')]
for r in local_results:
    site = r.get('siteName') or r.get('site', 'unknown')
    title = r.get('title', 'unknown')
    ptype = r.get('type', '')
    score = r.get('score', '')
    snippet = r.get('snippet','')[:200]
    print(f'Site: {site} | {ptype}: {title} (score: {score})')
    if snippet:
        print(f'  Preview: {snippet}')
    print()
" 2>&1
